title: Dialectic Lab

fields.vision: The Dialectic Lab (canonical Room ID dialectic-lab, display name "Dialectic Lab", experiential title "The Democratic Dialectic Chamber") is a MuranoOS room for a specific authorial project: a high-density, poetically interwoven, philosophically and historically serious corpus on democracy, authoritarianism, war, evil, America, memory, and vocation.
fields.mechanism: , state the backend/frontend or packet components, and decide whether the handoff is ready for engineering, public explanation, or archival retention
fields.source_utilization: Writing, rhetoric, narrative design, visual culture, and presentation. Use source library writing/visual/cinema sources to strengthen public exposition and Trilogy visual/storytelling logic. Vision: Make public pages read as curated intellectual exhibits rather than dashboards. Mechanism: Extract narrative sequencing, visual perception, close reading, rhetoric, style, cinema, and presentation mechanisms. Plan: Apply after domain-source routing so style clarifies evidence rather than masking weak evidence. Status: source library identified as candidate scholarly support; direct quotation requires exact passage review. Remaining gap: Need selective close-reading before adopting style doctrine. Source pool: 64 deduplicated local title candidates; 61 catalogue support rows. Examples: Narrative and Narration: Analyzing Cinematic Storytelling; Camera Lucida. Political theory, democracy, individuality, and civic formation. Use source library political theory as a central source reservoir for the Book Trilogy and democratic-formation pages. Vision: Give Book II, democracy, and civic-formation pages a political-theory spine rather than generic civics language. Mechanism: Extract liberty, equality, tyranny, statesmanship, party government, normativity, democracy, and Machiavellian institutional mechanisms. Plan: Close-read Book Trilogy and political-theory pages before importing formulations. Status: source library identified as candidate scholarly support; direct quotation requires exact passage review. Remaining gap: Need exact passages before public quotations or stronger scholarly claims. Source pool: 76 deduplicated local title candidates; 80 catalogue support rows. Examples: On Liberalism; Democracy and Its Fragility. source library scholarly-source routing with author correction. Raw filenames often append Nik_Murano and are not treated as authorship...
fields.plan: How this briefing says the vision should be accomplished, translated into a public project route. Reach for this when: (a) you need a paragraph-ledger + move-only editorial workflow pattern — the immutable_flag on canonical paragraph units is the key schema decision; (b) you are architecting a book-scale authoring room that must coexist with scholarly provenance, motif tracking, and audience-specific export derivation; (c) you want a reference for a room with 13 internal subspaces held inside one governed shell without fragmenting. Entry point: README.md — 05_OPERATOR/READING_ORDER_AND_USAGE.md — 00_STATUS/HANDOFF_CERTIFICATION.md — 01_ROOM_SPEC/Dialectic_Lab_Phase_I_Conceptual_Spec.md — 01_ROOM_SPEC/Dialectic_Lab_Entity_Model.md — 02_IMPLEMENTATION/Dialectic_Lab_Implementation_Tranche_Plan.md. Wire or preserve the implementation files: None — but 02_IMPLEMENTATION/Exact_File_Targets_And_Precedent_Map.md is unusually precise about where in the MuranoOS repo the implementation would land, and Dialectic_Lab_Implementation_Tranche_Plan.md phases it. The package is design-handoff DONE but code-handoff not claimed — a certified status repeated throughout.
fields.remaining_gaps: Promote the packet from documented handoff to live implementation only after the declared caveats are resolved: apply or wire the scaffold, run the stated validation or smoke-test sequence, and keep unresolved assumptions visible.
fields.detailed_source_vision: The Dialectic Lab (canonical Room ID dialectic-lab, display name "Dialectic Lab", experiential title "The Democratic Dialectic Chamber") is a MuranoOS room for a specific authorial project: a high-density, poetically interwoven, philosophically and historically serious corpus on democracy, authoritarianism, war, evil, America, memory, and vocation. The friction the room is designed to remove: the user "lacks a MuranoOS room that can preserve raw fragments losslessly, reveal conceptual structure, support move-only editorial assembly, maintain endnote-grade provenance, and scale into book-level architecture." Six-part purpose: (1) capture and preserve fragmentary insight without flattening it; (2) organize the project into a coherent intellectual architecture; (3) support strict paragraph-ledger and move-only editorial workflows (original source paragraphs remain immutable when designated as canonical paragraph units; new bridge lines must be explicitly marked as new...
fields.detailed_source_mechanism: , state the backend/frontend or packet components, and decide whether the handoff is ready for engineering, public explanation, or archival retention

maintenance_rule: Update this blueprint before strengthening public claims on the website. Do not use word count, module count, or status percentage as a substitute for concrete project substance.
claim_ceiling_rule: Public claims may rise only when the built components, source use, status, and remaining gaps are updated here and reflected in the rendered page.

public_standard_check.Vision: This document supports the public account of Blueprint by preserving the project purpose, reader-facing claim, and professional-portfolio role.
public_standard_check.Mechanism: It connects source material, project components, implementation state, and next actions so the work can be inspected rather than merely asserted.
public_standard_check.What is built: The supporting evidence is the named page, blueprint, packet, project file, source record, or implementation page described in the document.
public_standard_check.Source use: Sources are used as method and source background, domain grounding, or project history; direct quotation and stronger factual claims require passage-level review.
public_standard_check.Plan: Bind claims to exact source anchors, visible implementation evidence, or a narrower public claim.
public_standard_check.Status: Current support record for the professional package unless explicitly marked archival.
public_standard_check.Remaining Gaps: Passage-level source check, implementation verification, citation cleanup, and proportional public wording remain open where evidence is incomplete.

public_pitch.distinctive_mechanism: , state the backend/frontend or packet components, and decide whether the handoff is ready for engineering, public explanation, or archival retention
public_pitch.why_it_matters: It preserves the distinctive design logic for Dialectic Lab, so the portfolio can show the actual mechanism and status instead of reducing the project to a file-count or handoff label.
public_pitch.pitch_integrity_note: Mechanism-first public pitch inserted after the Nexus Lab mechanism-erasure audit on 2026-05-13; source basis: blueprint detailed source fields.

pitch_integrity_audit.standard: object, distinctive mechanism, value, built state, and non-overclaim discipline must be visible.
